name: JoAi: Delete Element

description.en: Permanently remove an element from your agent.
description.de: Entferne ein Element dauerhaft von deinem Agenten.

bot: Use this when the user wants to remove an element. If the user refers to an element by name, list elements first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Agent ID

description.en: The agent that owns this element
description.de: Der Agent, dem dieses Element gehört

inputs.bot: The agent hash ID that owns this element.

inputs.name: Element ID

description.en: The ID of the element to delete
description.de: Die ID des zu löschenden Elements

inputs.bot: The element hash ID. If the user refers to an element by name, list elements first to find the matching ID.
